uk: Переставлення преподобного отця нашого Аврамія, архимандрита, Ростовського чудотворця
saints.en: Ven. Abramius, Archimandrite, Wonderworker of Rostov. Ven. Protomartyr Anastasia of Rome. Ven. Abramius the Recluse

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир: 3 прпмч., 3 прп., Сл.: прп., І нині: богород. за гласом «Слава». Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар прпмч., Сл.: прп., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря прп. і за днем тижня.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар прпмч. (2), Сл.: прп., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря прп. Катизми чергові, сідальні Октоїха. Канон Октоїха, прпмч. та прп. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, прпмч. Сл.: прп., І нині: богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар прпмч., Сл.: прп., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря прп. і за днем тижня.
Часи: на 1-му – тропар дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му – прпмч. та 9-му – прп.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – 1 Сол. 265 зач.; 2, 9-14. Єв. – Лк. 57 зач.; 11, 14-23.

troparion_en.text: You abandoned all earthly comforts, O Father Abramius, / living righteously in hope of things to come and receiving a sacred anointing. / Initiated into divine mysteries, you enlighten those who cry: / Glory to him who has strengthened you! / Glory to him who has granted you a crown! / Glory to him who through you works healing for all!

kontakion_en.text: You lived in the flesh on earth as an angel, / and through your ascetic life you became like a tree nourished by the waters of abstinence and flourished. / You have washed away stains with the streams of your tears / and so you have been revealed, Abramius, to be a god-like vessel of the Spirit.

matched_oca_saint: Venerable Abramius the Recluse, and his niece, Blessed Mary, of Mesopotamia

troparion.text: Your lamb Anastasia, calls out to You, O Jesus, in a loud voice: / “I love You, my Bridegroom, and in seeking You I endure suffering. / In baptism I was crucified so that I might reign in You, / and I died so that I might live with You. / Accept me as a pure sacrifice, / for I have offered myself in love.” / Through her prayers save our souls, since You are merciful.

kontakion.text: (Podoben: “Today the Virgin...”)Cleansed by the waters of virginity, and the blood of martyrdom, Anastasia,  / you grant healing of every illness to those in need,  / and salvation to those who come with love;  / for Christ, the ever-flowing fountain of grace, has given you power.

oca_saints.name: Venerable Abramius the Recluse, and his niece, Blessed Mary, of Mesopotamia

troparion.text: You abandoned all earthly comforts, O Father Abramius, / living righteously in hope of things to come and receiving a sacred anointing. / Initiated into divine mysteries, you enlighten those who cry: / Glory to him who has strengthened you! / Glory to him who has granted you a crown! / Glory to him who through you works healing for all!

kontakion.text: You lived in the flesh on earth as an angel, / and through your ascetic life you became like a tree nourished by the waters of abstinence and flourished. / You have washed away stains with the streams of your tears / and so you have been revealed, Abramius, to be a god-like vessel of the Spirit.

troparion.text: You abandoned all earthly comforts, O Father Abramius, / living righteously in hope of things to come and receiving a sacred anointing. / Initiated into divine mysteries, you enlighten those who cry: / Glory to him who has strengthened you! / Glory to him who has granted you a crown! / Glory to him who through you works healing for all!

kontakion.text: You lived on earth as an angel in the flesh / and flourished as a well-planted tree, watered by abstinence and tears, / O Abramius, vessel of the Holy Spirit!

oca_saints.name: Martyr Claudius, Asterius, Neon, and Theonilla of Aegæ in Cilicia

troparion.text: Your holy martyrs, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy mother Anna, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Monastic Martyr Timothy of Esphigmenou, Mount Athos

troparion.text: The image of God was truly preserved in you, O Father, / for you took up the Cross and followed Christ. / By so doing you taught us to disregard the flesh for it passes away / but to care instead for the soul, since it is immortal. / Therefore your spirit, venerable Timothy, rejoices with the angels.

kontakion.text: As a venerable and proven ascetic, as an honorable and renowned martyr,  / and as a model of the desert life, O most exalted Timothy, /  we sing hymns of praise to you,  / for you have trampled upon serpents.

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Serapion, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!
